_comment: Declares every skill-bundled file that is derived from a repo canonical source. The repo is upstream; skills are downstream copies. scripts/check_skill_drift.py reads this file and fails CI when a copy diverges from its source. To add a pair: copy the canonical into _skills/<skill>/..., add an entry here, and (for conceptual) record the canonical sha256.

pairs.note: Byte-identical by contract. Edit the canonical, then re-sync the bundled copy and repackage the skill.

Not byte-identical by design: the skill copy is the richer/longer build reference. The check records the canonical's hash and flags when the canonical changes, so a human reconciles instead of an automated overwrite. After reconciling (or deciding no change is needed), update canonical_sha256 to the new hash to acknowledge.
